'''batate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:genderlessly|genderlessly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:genderlessly|genderlessly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| batate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:batate|batate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:batatesher|batatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:batatesherĂ«m|batatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:batatero|batatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:batateshĂ«|batateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:batateshĂ«m|batateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibatatero|gokibatatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibatateshĂ«|gokibatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibatateshĂ«m|gokibatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobatankerom|gobatankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobatankeshĂ«|gobatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobatankeshĂ«m|gobatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobatankeya|gobatankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bataterom|bataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:batatemu|batatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:batateya|batateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibataterom|gokibataterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibatatemu|gokibatatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibatateya|gokibatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:batatate|batatate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:batatatesher|batatatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:batatatesherĂ«m|batatatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:batatatero|batatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:batatateshĂ«|batatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:batatateshĂ«m|batatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibatatatero|gokibatatatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibatatateshĂ«|gokibatatateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibatatateshĂ«m|gokibatatateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobatatankerom|gobatatankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobatatankeshĂ«|gobatatankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobatatankeshĂ«m|gobatatankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobatatankeya|gobatatankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:batataterom|batataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:batatatemu|batatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:batatateya|batatateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibatataterom|gokibatataterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibatatatemu|gokibatatatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibatatateya|gokibatatateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠte|bĂŠtĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠtesher|bĂŠtĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m|bĂŠtĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠtero|bĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|bĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|bĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠtĂŠtero|gokibĂŠtĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«|gokibĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m|gokibĂŠtĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobĂŠtĂŠnkerom|gobĂŠtĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«|gobĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gobĂŠtĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠterom|bĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠtemu|bĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:bĂŠtĂŠteya|bĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibĂŠtĂŠterom|gokibĂŠtĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibĂŠtĂŠtemu|gokibĂŠtĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibĂŠtĂŠteya|gokibĂŠtĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:baftafte|baftafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:baftaftesher|baftaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baftaftesherĂ«m|baftaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:baftaftero|baftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:baftafteshĂ«|baftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baftafteshĂ«m|baftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibaftaftero|gokibaftaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokibaftafteshĂ«|gokibaftafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaftafteshĂ«m|gokibaftafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gobaftafnkerom|gobaftafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gobaftafnkeshĂ«|gobaftafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gobaftafnkeshĂ«m|gobaftafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gobaftafnkeya|gobaftafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:baftafterom|baftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:baftaftemu|baftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:baftafteya|baftafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokibaftafterom|gokibaftafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokibaftaftemu|gokibaftaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokibaftafteya|gokibaftafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
